id.description: A UUID string identifying this alert configuration.

slack_channel_id.description: Slack channel ID (e.g. 'C1234567890'). Required when type=slack. The PostHog Slack app must be a member of private channels.

slack_channel_name.description: Optional human-readable channel name (e.g. 'analytics-platform') used only for the destination's display name.

slack_workspace_id.description: ID of the connected Slack integration. Required when type=slack. Look this up via the integrations API.

type.description:
Destination type — either 'slack' (post to a Slack channel) or 'webhook' (POST to an HTTPS endpoint).

* `slack` - slack
* `webhook` - webhook

webhook_url.description: HTTPS endpoint to POST to when the alert fires. Required when type=webhook.
